intelligence_analysis.executive_summary: Detected 12 vessel candidates in the surveillance area, with 4 operating without AIS transponders. 6 vessels flagged as high risk. All 12 vessels have been analyzed for threat assessment and operational significance.
intelligence_analysis.threat_assessment: HIGH. Primary concerns include 4 dark vessels indicating potential intent to avoid detection, commonly associated with illegal fishing or other illicit maritime activities. The presence of vessels in this operational area warrants continued monitoring and potential enforcement action.
recommendations: Deploy maritime patrol assets to investigate dark vessel activities

Prioritize high-risk vessels for immediate follow-up surveillance

Continue monitoring the area for pattern analysis and trend identification
